use_codes.desc: NEW COMBINATION PRODUCT FOR THE EARLY TREATMENT OF RECURRENT HERPES LABIALIS (COLD SORES) TO REDUCE THE LIKELIHOOD OF ULCERATIVE COLD SORES AND TO SHORTEN THE LESION HEALING TIME IN ADULTS AND ADOLESCENTS (12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER)
